questions: Does the patient need improved oral hygiene? (Yes/No)
Is the toothbrush older than 3 months? (Yes/No)
Is the brushing frequency less than twice daily? (Yes/No)
Is the brushing technique incorrect OR is excessive force used? (Yes/No)
Is the flossing frequency less than once daily? (Yes/No)
Is there excessive sugar intake OR excessive aerated drink intake? (Yes/No)
Does the patient eat between meals? (Yes/No)
If yes, is rinsing mouth or brushing teeth not possible after eating between meals? (Yes/No)
Is fluorinated toothpaste ingested or swallowed during brushing? (Yes/No)
Is the dental checkup interval not 6 months? (Yes/No)
